Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has tankiness and early damage. Respect his all-in and farm safely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — dodge by stepping to the side.
Sion.early_game: Play defensively. Sion has strong early all-in potential.
Sion.mid_game: Use ult to suppress enemies in teamfights. Space properly.
Sion.late_game: He becomes very tanky. Use your sustained damage.
Sion.win_condition: Survive early, suppress enemies in teamfights. Win through macro play.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales — his tankiness increases late
Sion.positioning: Keep distance with E spam. Never walk into his all-in range.

Talon.trading_pattern: Talon has early mobility and burst. Play defensive and respect his all-in.
Talon.ability_to_dodge: Talon Q (Noxian Diplomacy) — dodge by stepping back.
Talon.early_game: Play very defensively. Talon dominates early skirmishes.
Talon.mid_game: Use ult to suppress enemies. Group with team.
Talon.win_condition: Survive early, suppress enemies in fights. Win through coordination.
Talon.scaling: Talon early game, Malzahar even late
Talon.positioning: Keep distance with E spam. Use ult defensively.

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has early burst with Tibbers. Respect her stun and farm safely.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q (Disintegrate) — dodge by moving away.
Annie.early_game: Play defensively. Annie has strong early burst potential.
Annie.mid_game: Use ult to suppress her in teamfights. Space in fights.
Annie.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Annie.win_condition: Survive early, suppress her in teamfights. Win through coordination.
Annie.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Annie.positioning: Keep distance with E spam. Never walk into Tibbers range.

Xerath.trading_pattern: Xerath outranges you significantly. Farm safely and respect his range.
Xerath.ability_to_dodge: Xerath Q (Runic Barrage) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Xerath.early_game: Play very defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Xerath.mid_game: Both scale. Use ult to suppress enemies.
Xerath.late_game: He outscales in poke damage. Use ult for teamfights.
Xerath.win_condition: Survive early, suppress enemies in teamfights. Win through coordination.
Xerath.scaling: Xerath outscales — his poke range is overwhelming
Xerath.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use minions for cover.

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has poke and mobility. Trade when her abilities are down.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q (Orb of Deception) — dodge by stepping sideways.
Ahri.early_game: Play defensively. Ahri has decent early poke.
Ahri.mid_game: Both scale. Use ult to suppress in teamfights.
Ahri.late_game: She outscales slightly. Use ult for teamfights.
Ahri.win_condition: Suppress her in teamfights. Win through coordinate plays.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored — her mobility and roam are superior
Ahri.positioning: Keep distance with E spam. Avoid her all-in range.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use E to farm and suppress freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range; ignore them.
Azir.early_game: Dominate with E spam. Azir is weak early.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Azir.late_game: He outscales. Finish before his control becomes oppressive.
Azir.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use E spam to suppress. Maintain mid control.

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze is weak early. Use E to farm and suppress freely.
